feature_requests.description: Every distinct feature request, capability ask, or improvement proposal found in this document

feature_name.description: Short name of the requested capability, e.g. 'MCP server support'

category.description: One of: ui, performance, integration, security, docs, ops, other

urgency.description: low, medium, high, or critical — based on language intensity and stated blockers

summary.description: 1-2 sentence summary of the request and its motivation

sentiment.description: positive, neutral, or negative tone of the requester

source_context.description: Where in the document this appears: session title, section heading, slide title
